steps.title: Identify what an unfamiliar audience needs to know
steps.content: The goal is to describe Unwoven Light to someone unfamiliar with Soo Sunny Park. An effective description must include: who the artist is, what the work looks like, and — most importantly — the defining visual effect (light forming colorful prisms through the fence). Any choice missing the prism effect or the artist's identity fails the task.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice against the goal
steps.content:
• Choice A — Park's 2013 installation Unwoven Light, which included a chain-link fence and iridescent tiles made from plexiglass, featured light as its primary medium of expression.: mentions materials but omits the colorful prism effect that makes the work distinctive; also does not identify Park for an unfamiliar audience. ✗
  • Choice B — Korean American light artist Soo Sunny Park created Unwoven Light in 2013.: identifies the artist and year but provides no description of the work at all. ✗
  • Choice C — The chain-link fence in Soo Sunny Park's Unwoven Light was fitted with tiles made from iridescent plexiglass.: describes a material detail but omits the prism effect and the artist’s identity for an unfamiliar audience. ✗
  • Choice D — In Unwoven Light, a 2013 work by Korean American artist Soo Sunny Park, light formed colorful prisms as it passed through a fence Park had fitted with iridescent tiles.: identifies the artist, dates the work, names the medium, and captures the defining visual effect — everything an unfamiliar audience needs. ✓
D is correct.
